name: Tongyi Lingma
description: Alibaba Clouds AI coding assistant (通义灵码) for IntelliJ, VS Code etc., powered by the Tongyi/Qwen family. Leading Chinese Copilot alternative.

seo.title: Tongyi Lingma — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Tongyi Lingma: Alibaba Clouds AI coding assistant (通义灵码) for IntelliJ, VS Code etc., powered by the Tongyi/Qwen family. Leading Chinese Copilot alternative.

when_to_use: Getting Alibaba Tongyi-powered AI completions inside VS Code
Building with codebase-aware completions across multiple files
Running AI code review and generation with Qwen-Coder backend
Accelerating development on Alibaba Cloud stack with AI assist

pros: Strong Chinese code and prompt understanding from Qwen family
Free tier generous for individual developers
Solid IntelliJ and VS Code integrations
Leading Copilot alternative within Chinese market
cons: Data routed through Alibaba Cloud by default
English code quality trails GPT-4 and Claude-based tools
Enterprise controls require Alibaba Cloud commitment
review.verdict: The strongest Chinese-market Copilot alternative, but outside China its edge evaporates.
review.best_for: Chinese developers and Alibaba Cloud enterprises wanting a Copilot-class assistant
review.not_for: Non-Chinese teams with strict data-locality rules or using AWS or GCP primarily
